project.title: The Founder's Debt
project.script:
"Please, I only need one more dollar... I will pay it tomorrow, I promise!" The voice was a dry and fragile rasp that seemed to carry the weight of a thousand winters as the elderly man’s trembling fingers dropped a few worn copper coins onto the cold plastic of the counter. His eyes were filled with a raw and ancient desperation while the cashier, a young and focused Black woman named Nala, watched him with an intensity that suggested she was searching for something deep within his soul.
Behind the old man, the line of shoppers began to groan with a polished and cruel impatience while several people lifted their phones to record the scene as if his poverty were nothing more than a background prop for their next viral video. A man in a tailored suit standing further back let out a sharp and jagged laugh, mocking the old man for not having the currency to buy a single bottle of milk and a loaf of bread.
The store manager, a man named Sterling, walked over with a face that was a mask of cold and calculated arrogance. He didn't look at the old man’s face but instead reached out to push the milk back across the scanner, telling him that Thorne Superstores were a place for patrons and not for beggars who couldn't balance a checkbook. But what no one in that building realized was that the woman behind the register was not just a cashier named Nala. She was Nala Thorne, the billionaire founder of the entire empire, and the man pleading for his life was the person who had saved her when she had nothing. The king had returned to find her mentor, and she was about to show Sterling exactly what happens when you treat a hero like a ghost.

analysis.title: The Founder's Debt
analysis.summary: A billionaire CEO working undercover as a cashier witnesses her manager and wealthy patrons humiliate an elderly man for being short on cash. The tension peaks when she recognizes the man as her former mentor, prompting a shift from observation to corporate retribution.

bible.visual_style: High-fidelity cinematic realism with a sharp focus on textural contrasts. The environment is rendered with clinical, corporate precision—stainless steel, polished linoleum, and glass—contrasted against the organic, weathered textures of the Elderly Man's skin and clothing. Shallow depth of field is used during emotional peaks to isolate Nala and her mentor from the bustling, indifferent background. Camera movements are steady and observational, shifting to tight, intimate close-ups during the confrontation.
bible.lighting: Motivated by harsh, overhead industrial fluorescents that create a sterile, unforgiving atmosphere. High-key lighting dominates the store aisles to emphasize the 'corporate' feel, while the checkout counter utilizes a subtle rim light on Nala to signify her hidden status. The antagonists are lit with slightly cooler tones to appear detached, while the Elderly Man is caught in softer, warmer pockets of light to evoke empathy.
bible.tone: A tense, social-realist drama that balances cold corporate apathy with simmering emotional justice.

characters.name: Nala Thorne
characters.description: A billionaire CEO in her late 30s with an observant, calculating gaze. She hides her natural command behind a mask of retail subservience.
characters.wardrobe: A slightly oversized, cheap polyester blue vest with a 'Thorne Superstore' logo, a plain white t-shirt, and dark slacks.
characters.distinctive_features: Piercing eyes that contrast with her humble attire; a small, high-end smartwatch hidden under her sleeve.

characters.name: Elderly Man
characters.description: A man in his late 70s, once a titan of industry, now physically frail but retaining a core of dignity.
characters.wardrobe: A threadbare, oversized wool overcoat in charcoal, a faded flannel shirt, and worn corduroy trousers.
characters.distinctive_features: Trembling hands, deep-set weary eyes, and a patch of silver stubble.

characters.name: Sterling
characters.description: A mid-level floor manager in his 30s, desperate to exert the little power he has.
characters.wardrobe: A crisp, over-starched white button-down, a tight tie, and a name tag that reads 'Floor Lead'.
characters.distinctive_features: Slicked-back hair and a persistent, condescending smirk.

characters.name: Man in Tailored Suit
characters.description: An affluent patron in his 40s, representing the impatient, wealthy elite.
characters.wardrobe: A navy pinstripe bespoke suit, a gold watch, and polished leather oxfords.
characters.distinctive_features: A look of visible disgust; constantly checking a high-end smartphone.

locations.name: Thorne Superstore Checkout Counter
locations.description: The epicenter of the conflict. A high-tech, sterile retail environment designed for efficiency over humanity.
key_elements: Plexiglass dividers reflecting the harsh overhead lights

props.name: Worn Copper Coins
props.description: A handful of dull, oxidized pennies and nickels.
props.importance: Symbolizes the Elderly Man's fall from grace and the 'debt' of the title.

props.name: Bottle of Milk and Loaf of Bread
props.description: Generic store-brand staples in plastic packaging.
props.importance: Represents the basic human needs at the center of the humiliation.

props.name: Barcode Scanner
props.description: A handheld laser scanner that emits a sharp, clinical 'beep'.
props.importance: The rhythmic sound adds to the auditory tension and the dehumanization of the transaction.

props.name: Smartphones
props.description: Held by patrons to film the Elderly Man's struggle.
props.importance: Represents the voyeuristic cruelty of the modern age.

continuity_rules: The 'Balance Due' on the screen must remain consistent across all shots in the sequence.
Nala's hair must remain tucked behind her ears to maintain her 'undercover' look until the final reveal.
The lighting intensity must not flicker, maintaining the oppressive feel of industrial retail lights.
The placement of the coins on the black conveyor belt must be tracked for visual consistency in close-ups.

locations.prompt: THORNE SUPERSTORE CHECKOUT COUNTER — EXTREME WIDE PANORAMIC ESTABLISHING SHOT, EMPTY SET, NO PEOPLE. A colossal, high-tech retail environment defined by a sterile, clinical aesthetic and vast spatial scale. The composition features a perfect symmetrical linear perspective of twenty parallel checkout lanes, each constructed from brushed titanium, tempered glass, and white matte polymers with integrated soft-blue LED accent strips. Sleek, transparent holographic interface screens hover silently above each station, displaying idle diagnostic data. The polished white epoxy floor creates a mirror-like reflection of the overhead recessed geometric lighting panels. In the far background, massive minimalist digital walls display the 'Thorne' corporate logo in a muted, sophisticated font. Cinematic 14mm anamorphic wide-angle lens, deep depth of field, high-key architectural lighting, cold color palette (whites, cyans, and greys), 8k resolution, photorealistic film production design for a sci-fi corporate setting.

storyboards.story_beat: The Elderly Man arrives at the clinical checkout counter with his meager items.

shots.action: Wide view of the sterile checkout lane. Nala in her blue vest stands behind the counter as the Elderly Man in his charcoal overcoat slowly approaches the conveyor belt.
shots.dialogue_audio: Hum of industrial refrigerators and distant store music.

shots.action: The Elderly Man's trembling hands place a single bottle of milk and a loaf of bread onto the black conveyor belt.
shots.dialogue_audio: The rhythmic thud of the conveyor belt starting.

shots.action: Nala’s hands, efficient and mechanical, slide the milk across the glowing red barcode laser.
shots.dialogue_audio: A sharp, digital 'beep'.

shots.action: Nala looks up from the scanner, her face a neutral mask, observing the man's weary eyes.
shots.dialogue_audio: Ambient store chatter.

storyboards.story_beat: The transaction stalls as the Elderly Man realizes he is short on cash.

shots.action: The Elderly Man spills a handful of worn copper coins onto the black belt. They roll and settle, clearly insufficient.
shots.dialogue_audio: The metallic clinking of coins on hard plastic.

shots.action: The digital POS display glows with the text 'Balance Due: $2.45'. The red light reflects off the plexiglass.
shots.dialogue_audio: Silence, save for the hum of the store.

shots.action: The Elderly Man frantically searches his overcoat pockets, his face flushing with embarrassment.
shots.dialogue_audio: The sound of rustling fabric.

shots.action: Nala watches him, her eyes narrowing slightly as she notices a specific detail on his worn cuff.
shots.dialogue_audio: Heavy, rhythmic breathing from the man.

storyboards.story_beat: The wealthy patron behind him expresses visible and tactile impatience.

shots.action: The Man in Tailored Suit sighs heavily, his body language stiff and aggressive as he looms behind the Elderly Man.
shots.dialogue_audio: A sharp, exaggerated exhale.

shots.action: The Man in Tailored Suit checks his gold watch, then aggressively taps on his high-end smartphone screen.
shots.dialogue_audio: The rapid tapping of a finger on glass.

shots.action: The Man in Tailored Suit steps forward, invading the Elderly Man's personal space, looking at the ceiling in disgust.
shots.dialogue_audio: The sound of leather oxfords scuffing the linoleum.

shots.action: The checkout line stretches back, other customers looking on with varying degrees of indifference and annoyance.
shots.dialogue_audio: A low murmur of complaints from the back of the line.

storyboards.story_beat: Sterling, the floor manager, arrives to exert his authority.

shots.action: Sterling marches into the frame, his 'Floor Lead' name tag catching the harsh overhead light.
shots.dialogue_audio: Fast, authoritative footsteps.

shots.action: Sterling’s face in a condescending smirk as he looks down at the coins on the belt.
shots.dialogue_audio: Sterling's voice: 'Problem here, Thorne?'

shots.action: The Elderly Man lowers his head, his silver stubble catching the light, looking small against the corporate backdrop.
shots.dialogue_audio: A shaky, quiet apology.

shots.action: Nala’s hand grips the edge of the counter, her knuckles turning white under the blue polyester sleeve.
shots.dialogue_audio: The creak of the plastic counter under pressure.

storyboards.story_beat: Nala recognizes the Elderly Man as her former mentor.

shots.action: Nala’s eyes widen. The focus shifts from the counter to the reflection of the Elderly Man in her pupils.
shots.dialogue_audio: The store noise fades into a muffled, heartbeat-like rhythm.

shots.action: The Elderly Man is isolated by a shallow depth of field; the background blurs as a warm light hits his face.
shots.dialogue_audio: A soft, melodic chime from the store's PA system.

shots.action: Nala sees a small, tarnished lapel pin on his coat—a symbol of the company's founding era.
shots.dialogue_audio: Silence.

shots.action: Nala’s expression shifts from retail mask to calculated, piercing intensity.
shots.dialogue_audio: Nala's breath hitching.

storyboards.story_beat: Sterling attempts to remove the man, but Nala intervenes physically.

shots.action: Sterling reaches out to grab the milk bottle and the loaf of bread to pull them away from the man.
shots.dialogue_audio: Sterling: 'No money, no food. Move it along.'

shots.action: Nala's hand slams down on the conveyor belt, stopping Sterling's hand mid-reach.
shots.dialogue_audio: A loud, echoing 'THUD' on the plastic belt.

shots.action: Sterling recoils, his eyes wide with confusion and rising anger at the insubordination.
shots.dialogue_audio: Sterling's indignant gasp.

shots.action: The Man in Tailored Suit scoffs and checks his watch again, oblivious to the shift in power.
shots.dialogue_audio: Man in Suit: 'Are we doing this or what?'

storyboards.story_beat: Nala prepares to reveal her true identity to the stunned antagonists.

shots.action: Nala slowly pulls back the sleeve of her blue polyester vest, revealing a sleek, high-end titanium smartwatch.
shots.dialogue_audio: The soft rustle of high-quality fabric under the cheap vest.

shots.action: Nala stands fully upright, her posture transforming from a slouched cashier to a commanding executive.
shots.dialogue_audio: The store noise seems to drop away.

shots.action: Low angle shot of Nala looking down at Sterling. He looks small and insignificant in her shadow.
shots.dialogue_audio: Nala's voice: 'Check the employee ID again, Sterling.'

shots.action: The Elderly Man looks up, a flicker of recognition and hope crossing his weary face.
shots.dialogue_audio: The man's breath catching in a faint sob.

storyboards.story_beat: Nala settles the debt and takes control of the store.

shots.action: Nala taps her watch against the POS terminal. A blue light flashes, signaling an executive override.
shots.dialogue_audio: A high-pitched, melodic 'Success' tone from the terminal.

shots.action: The store atmosphere shifts; the harsh overhead lights seem to reflect the newfound clarity of the situation.
shots.dialogue_audio: The store's overhead music cuts out abruptly.

shots.action: The POS screen changes from 'Balance Due' to 'Transaction Complete: Thorne Executive Account'.
shots.dialogue_audio: The sound of a receipt printer starting.

shots.action: Nala reaches across the counter and gently places her hand over the Elderly Man’s trembling hand.
shots.dialogue_audio: Nala's voice: 'It’s been a long time, Mentor.'

seedance.board_prompt: Interior Thorne Superstore, low angle perspective. Nala slowly pulls back her blue polyester sleeve to reveal a sleek titanium smartwatch, her posture shifting from a slouched cashier to a commanding executive stance. She stands fully upright, looking down at Sterling who appears small and insignificant in her shadow, while the Elderly Man looks up with a flicker of recognition and hope. The camera captures a static 85mm close-up of the watch followed by a slow 35mm push-in on Nala’s face and a low-angle 50mm shot establishing her dominance. Photorealistic, natural lighting, true-to-life colors, sharp focus, documentary quality. Style: realistic.

Nala taps her titanium watch against the POS terminal, triggering a flashing blue light and an executive override that changes the screen to 'Transaction Complete: Thorne Executive Account'. Nala then reaches across the counter to gently place her hand over the Elderly Man’s trembling hand in a gesture of gratitude. The camera uses a static 50mm shot of the tap, a 24mm wide shot of the store, and a final slow 50mm push-in on the joined hands. issues.description: The continuity rule in the Bible specifying Nala's hair must remain 'tucked behind her ears' is missing from the character sheet prompt and all storyboard/seedance prompts, risking inconsistent facial framing.
issues.suggestion: Add 'hair neatly tucked behind ears' to Nala Thorne's character sheet and all storyboard descriptions to maintain her 'undercover' persona.

issues.description: There is a discrepancy in coin quantity: the Location prompt specifies 'three small copper coins', while the Bible and Storyboard 2 describe a 'handful'.
issues.suggestion: Standardize the description to 'a scattered handful of 5-7 worn copper coins' across the Location and Storyboard prompts to prevent visual flickering in close-ups.

issues.description: Specific hex codes from the Bible (#002D62, #F5F5F5) are utilized in the Location prompt but are absent from the Seedance prompts, which may lead to color drift in the generated video.
issues.suggestion: Integrate the primary hex codes (Corporate Blue #002D62 and Clinical White #F5F5F5) into the environment description of each Seedance prompt.

issues.description: Nala's watch is described as a 'small, high-end smartwatch' in the character sheet but as a 'sleek titanium smartwatch' in Board 7 and Board 8. Titanium implies a specific metallic texture not mentioned in the initial character prompt.
issues.suggestion: Update the character sheet to specify 'titanium smartwatch' to ensure the material texture is consistent during the reveal.
